        (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (sq_le_sq.2 (le_max_right _ _)) hdy.le)
  conj_symm := by intro _ _; simp only [map_add, conj_symm]; rfl
  add_left := by intro _ _ _; simp only [inner_add_left, add_assoc, add_left_comm]; rfl
  smul_left := by intro _ _ _; simp only [inner_smul_left, mul_add]; rfl

В· cases le_total вҖ–xвҖ– вҖ–yвҖ– <;> simp [max_eq_left, max_eq_right, *]
            В· exact le_add_of_nonneg_left (sq_nonneg _)
            В· exact le_add_of_nonneg_right (sq_nonneg _)
        _ = min cx cy вҖў вҖ–xвҖ–^2 + min cx cy вҖў вҖ–yвҖ–^2 := smul_add _ _ _
        _ вүӨ cx вҖў вҖ–xвҖ–^2 + cy вҖў вҖ–yвҖ–^2 := by
          gcongr
          В· exact min_le_left _ _
          В· exact min_le_right _ _
        _ вүӨ re вҹӘx, xвҹ« + re вҹӘy, yвҹ« := add_le_add (hx x).1 (hy y).1
    В· calc
        re вҹӘx, xвҹ« + re вҹӘy, yвҹ« вүӨ dx вҖў вҖ–xвҖ–^2 + dy вҖў вҖ–yвҖ–^2 := add_le_add (hx x).2 (hy y).2
        _ вүӨ dx вҖў (max вҖ–xвҖ– вҖ–yвҖ–)^2 + dy вҖў (max вҖ–xвҖ– вҖ–yвҖ–)^2 := by
          gcongr
          В· exact le_max_left _ _
          В· exact le_max_right _ _
        _ = (dx + dy) вҖў (max вҖ–xвҖ– вҖ–yвҖ–)^2 := by simp [add_smul]
  conj_symm := by intros; simp [map_add, conj_symm, add_comm]
  add_left := by intros; simp [map_add, add_left]; ring
  smul_left := by intros; simp [map_add, smul_left, mul_add]

_ вүӨ re вҹӘx,xвҹ«_рқ•ң := (hx x).1
          _ вүӨ re вҹӘx,xвҹ«_рқ•ң + re вҹӘy,yвҹ«_рқ•ң := le_add_of_nonneg_right inner_self_nonneg
      В· calc re вҹӘx,xвҹ«_рқ•ң + re вҹӘy,yвҹ«_рқ•ң
          _ вүӨ dx * вҖ–xвҖ–^2 + dy * вҖ–yвҖ–^2 := add_le_add (hx x).2 (hy y).2
          _ вүӨ dx * вҖ–xвҖ–^2 + dy * вҖ–xвҖ–^2 := add_le_add_left (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (sq_le_sq.2 h) (le_of_lt hdy)) _
          _ = (dx + dy) * вҖ–xвҖ–^2 := (add_mul _ _ _).symm
  conj_symm := by intro _ _; dsimp; simp [conj_symm]
  add_left := by intro _ _ _; dsimp; simp [inner_add_left]; ring
  smul_left := by intro _ _ _; dsimp; simp [inner_smul_left]; ring

| inr h =>
        rw [max_eq_left h]
        refine le_add_of_nonneg_of_le (by positivity) (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (min_le_left _ _) (by positivity))
    В· rw [smul_eq_mul, add_mul]
      refine le_trans (add_le_add hx.2 hy.2) (add_le_add ?_ ?_)
      В· exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (pow_le_pow_left (norm_nonneg _) (le_max_left _ _) 2) (le_of_lt hdx)
      В· exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (pow_le_pow_left (norm_nonneg _) (le_max_right _ _) 2) (le_of_lt hdy)

В· exact le_trans (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (min_le_left _ _) (sq_nonneg _))
          (le_add_of_le_of_nonneg (hx x).1 (by positivity))
    В· apply le_trans (add_le_add (hx x).2 (hy y).2)
      rw [add_mul]
      gcongr
      В· exact le_max_left _ _
      В· exact le_max_right _ _
  conj_symm := by intros; simp [map_add, conj_symm, add_comm]
  add_left := by intros; simp [inner_add_left, Prod.fst_add, Prod.snd_add]; ring
  smul_left := by intros; simp [inner_smul_left, Prod.smul_fst, Prod.smul_snd]; ring

_ вүӨ re вҹӘx, xвҹ«_рқ•ң := hx.1
            _ вүӨ re вҹӘx, xвҹ«_рқ•ң + re вҹӘy, yвҹ«_рқ•ң := le_add_of_nonneg_right (le_trans (by positivity) hy.1)
      В· calc
          re вҹӘx, xвҹ«_рқ•ң + re вҹӘy, yвҹ«_рқ•ң вүӨ dx вҖў вҖ–xвҖ– ^ 2 + dy вҖў вҖ–yвҖ– ^ 2 := add_le_add hx.2 hy.2
          _ вүӨ dx вҖў (max вҖ–xвҖ– вҖ–yвҖ–) ^ 2 + dy вҖў (max вҖ–xвҖ– вҖ–yвҖ–) ^ 2 := by gcongr <;> simp only [le_max_left, le_max_right]
          _ = (dx + dy) вҖў вҖ–(x, y)вҖ– ^ 2 := by simp [add_smul]
  conj_symm := by intros; simp [map_add, conj_symm]
  add_left := by intros; simp [add_left]; ring
  smul_left := by intros; simp [smul_left, mul_add]

rw [вҶҗ mul_add]
      apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left _ (le_of_lt (lt_min hcx hcy))
      apply max_le (le_add_of_nonneg_right (by positivity)) (le_add_of_nonneg_left (by positivity))
    В· apply le_trans (add_le_add hxr hyr)
      rw [add_mul]
      apply add_le_add
      В· apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (pow_le_pow_left (norm_nonneg _) (le_max_left _ _) _) (le_of_lt hdx)
      В· apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (pow_le_pow_left (norm_nonneg _) (le_max_right _ _) _) (le_of_lt hdy)
  conj_symm := fun _ _ => by simp only [map_add, conj_symm]; rfl
  add_left := fun _ _ _ => by simp only [Prod.mk_add_mk, map_add, add_left]; ring
  smul_left := fun _ _ _ => by simp only [Prod.smul_mk, map_add, smul_left, map_mul]; ring

re вҹӘx, xвҹ«_рқ•ң + re вҹӘy, yвҹ«_рқ•ң
          вүӨ dx вҖў вҖ–xвҖ– ^ 2 + dy вҖў вҖ–yвҖ– ^ 2 := add_le_add hx.2 hy.2
        _ вүӨ dx вҖў (max вҖ–xвҖ– вҖ–yвҖ–) ^ 2 + dy вҖў (max вҖ–xвҖ– вҖ–yвҖ–) ^ 2 := by
            gcongr <;> simp
        _ = (dx + dy) вҖў (max вҖ–xвҖ– вҖ–yвҖ–) ^ 2 := by rw [add_smul]

apply le_add_of_nonneg_of_le (inner_self_nonneg (x:=x)) hy.1
      В· rw [max_eq_left h]
        apply le_trans (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (min_le_left _ _) (sq_nonneg _))
        apply le_add_of_le_of_nonneg hx.1 (inner_self_nonneg (x:=y))
    В· apply le_trans (add_le_add hx.2 hy.2)
      rw [add_mul]
      gcongr <;> simp [le_max_left, le_max_right]

simp only [smul_eq_mul]
      cases le_total вҖ–xвҖ– вҖ–yвҖ– with h h <;> rw [max_eq_right h, max_eq_left h]
      В· apply le_add_of_nonneg_of_le
        В· apply mul_nonneg (le_of_lt hcx) (sq_nonneg _)
        В· apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (min_le_right _ _) (sq_nonneg _)
      В· apply le_add_of_le_of_nonneg
        В· apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (min_le_left _ _) (sq_nonneg _)
        В· apply mul_nonneg (le_of_lt hcy) (sq_nonneg _)
    В· rw [map_add]
      apply le_trans (add_le_add hx.2 hy.2) _
      simp only [smul_eq_mul, add_mul]
      gcongr
      В· exact le_max_left _ _
      В· exact le_max_right _ _
  conj_symm _ _ := by simp [conj_symm, add_comm]
  add_left _ _ _ := by simp [add_left, add_add_add_comm]
  smul_left _ _ _ := by simp [smul_left, mul_add]
